hero.title: Building Zero to One
hero.subtitle: Aspiring Entrepreneur combining engineering fundamentals, AI, and startup velocity to solve real-world problems.

cards.heading: Who Am I
cards.content: I'm Polavarapu Dinesh, a highly motivated engineering student at IIT Tirupati with a strong inclination towards building technology-driven solutions for real-world problems. I believe in learning by building and continuously improving through hands-on projects, experimentation, and interdisciplinary learning.

cards.heading: My Interests
cards.content: My interests lie at the intersection of software development, applied machine learning, robotics, and engineering design, with a long-term vision of becoming an entrepreneur who creates impactful products.

cards.heading: Career Vision
cards.content: To become an entrepreneur who solves real-world problems using engineering, AI, robotics, and software, and builds products with meaningful societal impact.

projects.title: LifeLine AI
projects.keywords: Applied Machine Learning, Healthcare AI, Python
projects.description: Built an ML-based healthcare analytics system to analyze medical data and provide predictive insights for disease diagnosis and health risk assessment.

projects.title: Guardian
projects.description: Designed a system focused on monitoring and alerting through logical automation workflows for proactive safety management.

projects.title: Prasadam Plate Counter (Temple Automation)
projects.description: Developed an automated plate-counting system using computer vision to improve accuracy and reduce manual effort in temple operations.

projects.title: Track-U – Attendance Tracker
projects.description: Built a web-based attendance tracking platform with structured data handling for efficient management of attendance records.

projects.title: Blackhole Pomodoro
projects.description: Developed a customized Pomodoro timer for focused and distraction-free work with deep customization options.

projects.title: Productivity Pro
projects.description: Built an all-in-one productivity platform including task planning, event scheduling, and Pomodoro focus sessions.

projects.title: Aurivon (Android App)
projects.description: Built a powerful Android app using Android Studio with advanced features like calendars, projects, and task planning.

projects.title: Py Test Platform
projects.description: Created a Python testing platform inspired by the JEE Advanced portal with real-time code execution and test-case evaluation.

projects.title: Notivon
projects.description: Built an infinite hierarchical note-taking system for deep structured thinking and knowledge organization.

projects.title: E-Commerce Website
projects.description: Developed a full-stack e-commerce website with integrated payment gateways for online selling platforms.

projects.title: Utility Tools
projects.description: Created a suite of utility tools including QR Generator, PDF Editor, Infinite Hierarchical Notes, and other productivity tools.

projects.title: Quadruped Robot
projects.description: Currently learning robotics from My Equation Robo AI. Designing and building a fully functional quadruped robot integrating mechanical design, electronics, and control systems.

projects.title: Robotic Arm
projects.description: Planning and designing an advanced robotic arm with integrated mechanical, electronic, and software components for precision manipulation.

items.description: Entered IIT Tirupati through JEE 2024. Actively pursuing interdisciplinary learning alongside core mechanical engineering.

items.institution: Sri Rama Krishna English Medium School

items.title: Data Structures & Algorithms
items.description: Comprehensive study of algorithms, complexity analysis, and data structure implementations

items.title: Applied Machine Learning
items.description: Practical ML techniques, model building, and real-world applications in healthcare data science

items.title: AI in Mechanical Engineering
items.description: Exploring convergence of AI and mechanical systems for intelligent automation

items.title: Product Innovation
items.description: Building market-ready products that solve real-world problems at scale

items.title: Startups
items.description: Zero-to-one entrepreneurship and scaling ventures from concept to market

items.title: Sustainable Design
